sourcePrompt: An M3A1 "Grease Gun" .45 submachine gun issued to US armored crews, about three quarters of a meter with its wire stock extended. A crude stamped-steel cylindrical body like a mechanic's grease gun, a stubby barrel, a long straight box magazine hanging from the underside, a simple pistol grip, and a thin collapsible wire shoulder stock of two parallel rods.. Low-poly, game-ready, clean hard edges.
